update.releaseNotes:
v1.0.1 - Changelog
> [!NOTE] > Jacob-Met custom fork (Trackblazer). Based on upstream v5.6.1.
Fixes — training / charm logic --- - Fix rest at high energy when stats were wrongly skipped for low-gain charm at 0% failure. - Fix charm assumed in analysis when charm would never queue (per-stat pool, min-gain, mood, Wit checks). - Fix misleading energy-recovery bail when first training tab exceeded failure threshold. - Skip full stat scan only when failure exceeds threshold AND no charm/energy mitigation items remain. - Honor failure-mitigation pool reserve override when deciding if charms warrant a full scan. - Prefer safe executable training fallback and mitigation retry before backing out to rest. - Skip training analysis at 0% energy only when no charm or energy-restoring items remain. - Remove zero-energy low-gain charm bypass; risky charm always requires min stat gain (Climax excepted).
Import / updates --- - Import upstream master 5.7.x settings JSON with automatic key remapping. - Update checker reads this fork's release feed (no false prompt for upstream 5.7.x on launch).
